notes: URBAN TECH + SMART CITIES + PROPTECH + REAL ESTATE INNOVATION scan. 0 niches confirmed blue ocean. 10 duplicates filtered. Key finding: Real Estate Investing Fundamentals (25/25) is the highest-scoring niche in this category — 24.3M community, BiggerPockets does NOT provide a streak-based daily curriculum. Commercial RE Finance (24/25) and Zoning + Land Use Law (24/25) follow, both with professional certification markets (CCIM, AICP) creating clear WTP. Short-Term Rental Analytics (24/25) taps into a rapidly scaling Airbnb investor cohort that AirDNA serves with data but not education. Real estate is unique: it's the #1 wealth-building vehicle in the US, has mandatory professional licensing that creates captive learners, and yet has ZERO streak-based educational apps targeting the investor curriculum gap. The App Store has search apps (Zillow/Redfin), management apps (Buildium/Stessa), and data apps (CoStar/AirDNA) — but zero apps that TEACH cap rates, NOI, 1031 mechanics, DSCR math, or zoning variance procedures via daily drills.
